docs.title: Verified Linux Package for RZ MPU
docs.text:
Verified Linux Package (VLP) for RZ MPU

VLP provides 10-year maintenance support for the Linux BSP built on the SLTS kernel/CIP.

  • Provides Yocto recipes and documentations for VLP by Renesas.com
  • It also supports middleware specialized for target applications.
  • Life cycle is 10 years.

What is the Civil Infrastructure Platform (CIP)? The Civil Infrastructure Platform is a platform that aims to establish a base layer for building Linux-based embedded systems that satisfy the requirements of modern civil infrastructure. It is driven by The Linux Foundation and global leading infrastructure system manufacturers.

Trademark: Civil Infrastructure Platform and CIP are trademarks of The Linux Foundation in the United States and other countries.

docs.title: List of Supported VLP versions
docs.text:
Renesas provides the basic software required for the industrial segment as the verified software package. Renesas also provides the multimedia package for installing H.264/H.265 Video codec and graphics (OpenGL ES) function into the RZ MPU BSP (Board Support Package). Please go to the page from the link that indicates the version of VLP in the table below, download the package and use it.

VLP Version CIP Kernel Version RZ/T2H,RZ/N2H RZ/G2L,RZ/G2LC, RZ/G2UL,RZ/G3S RZ/G2H,RZ/G2M, RZ/G2N,RZ/G2E RZ/G1H,RZ/G1M, RZ/G1N,RZ/G1E,RZ/G1C VLP maintenance end date VLP v5 6.12, 6.12-rt ✓ - - - 2035/2H VLP v4 6.1, 6.1-rt - ✔ - - 2033/2H VLP v3 5.10, 5.10-rt - ✔ ✔ ✔ 2031/1H VLP64 4.19, 4.19-rt - - ✔ - 2029/1H VLP v2 4.4, 4.4-rt - - - ✔ 2027/1H

Note

Each VLP maintenance will be finished when the maintenance of corresponding CIP Linux Kernel version is completed. Use of the latest version VLP is recommended. Please refer to CIP Wiki for CIP Linux kernel maintenance periods.

The packages for the features you want to use can be downloaded from the list below:

  • RZ MPU Security Package This package is to add Security functions (Secure Boot, Trusted Execution Environment, Hardware Cryptographic IP, Secure Debug, Security Configurator) to RZ MPU.

  • RZ Multi-OS Package This package is the software package consisting of RZ/G Flexible Software Package (FSP) as software package for Renesas MCU with Arm® Cortex-M Core and OpenAMP as standardization API of framework for interprocessor communication for developing multi OS solution.

  • HTML5 Package HTML5 enables rich HMI development based on advanced Web technologies including JavaScript.

    • Chromium Package This package provides additional Chromium functions (rendering engine: Blink).

    • Gecko Package This package provides additional rendering engine Gecko.

  • Qt6 Package This package is for integrating Qt, a cross-platform GUI application development framework. (This package provides for VLP v4. VLP v3 includes Qt5.6.3 for VLP.)

  • Industrial Software Packages

    • Industrial Network Package Provides examples for using industrial Ethernet protocols and frameworks to accelerate Ethernet communication.

    • Time-sensitive Network Package Offers examples for using TSN technologies, enabling real‑time communication over Ethernet.

    • XDP Package Includes examples for using XDP, a high‑performance Linux kernel packet‑processing framework designed for efficient, low‑latency network handling.

    • OpenPLC Package Explains how to install OpenPLC and the OpenPLC Runtime on both a Windows PC and the evaluation board.

    • CODESYS Package Provides instructions for installing CODESYS and the CODESYS Runtime on a Windows PC and the evaluation board.

docs.title: Welcome to MkDocs
docs.text: For full documentation visit mkdocs.org.

docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: Adding a title
Adding annotations
docs.text:
theme:
  features:
    - content.code.annotate # (1)
  1. I'm a code annotation! I can contain code, formatted text, images, ... basically anything that can be written in Markdown.

docs.title: Stripping comments
docs.text:
# (1)!
  1. Look ma, less line noise!

docs.title: Adding line numbers
docs.text:
def bubble_sort(items):
    for i in range(len(items)):
        for j in range(len(items) - 1 - i):
            if items[j] > items[j + 1]:
                items[j], items[j + 1] = items[j + 1], items[j]

docs.title: Highlighting specific lines
docs.text:
def bubble_sort(items):
    for i in range(len(items)):
        for j in range(len(items) - 1 - i):
            if items[j] > items[j + 1]:
                items[j], items[j + 1] = items[j + 1], items[j]

docs.title: Highlighting inline code blocks
docs.text: The range() function is used to generate a sequence of numbers.

docs.title: Embedding external files
docs.text:
serve.sh
#!/usr/bin/env bash

# serve.sh
# To serve webpage at yours local ip with port=8000

ip=$(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}')
port=8080

address=$ip:$port

mkdocs serve -a $address

docs.title: Zoomable image
docs.text:
Danger

Hyperlink to images should follow referrer page location. In this case:

  • Referrer page: guidelines/index.md.
  • Referred image: images/<image-name>.

Where images directory is inside guidelines directory.

docs.title: Subtitles
docs.text:
The best solution for starting your HMI applications.

HMI SDK are quick and easy solutions for starting HMI.

docs.title: Highlighting changes
docs.text:
Text can be deleted and replacement text added. This can also be combined into onea single operation. Highlighting is also possible and comments can be added inline.

Formatting can also be applied to blocks by putting the opening and closing tags on separate lines and adding new lines between the tags and the content.

docs.title: Highlighting text
docs.text:
• This was marked (highlight)
  • This was inserted (underline)
  • This was deleted (strikethrough)

docs.title: Sub- and superscripts
docs.text:
• H2O
  • ATA

docs.text: Ctrl+Alt+Del

Footnotes always placed at last of page, regardless referrer place.

docs.title: List of Supported VLP versions
docs.text:
Renesas provides the basic software required for the industrial segment as the verified software package. Renesas also provides the multimedia package for installing H.264/H.265 Video codec and graphics (OpenGL ES) function into the RZ MPU BSP (Board Support Package). Please go to the page from the link that indicates the version of VLP in the table below, download the package and use it.

VLP Version CIP Kernel Version RZ/T2H,RZ/N2H RZ/G2L,RZ/G2LC, RZ/G2UL,RZ/G3S RZ/G2H,RZ/G2M, RZ/G2N,RZ/G2E RZ/G1H,RZ/G1M, RZ/G1N,RZ/G1E,RZ/G1C VLP maintenance end date VLP v5 6.12, 6.12-rt ✓ - - - 2035/2H VLP v4 6.1, 6.1-rt - ✔ - - 2033/2H VLP v3 5.10, 5.10-rt - ✔ ✔ ✔ 2031/1H VLP64 4.19, 4.19-rt - - ✔ - 2029/1H VLP v2 4.4, 4.4-rt - - - ✔ 2027/1H

Note

Each VLP maintenance will be finished when the maintenance of corresponding CIP Linux Kernel version is completed. Use of the latest version VLP is recommended. Please refer to CIP Wiki for CIP Linux kernel maintenance periods.

The packages for the features you want to use can be downloaded from the list below:

  • RZ MPU Security Package This package is to add Security functions (Secure Boot, Trusted Execution Environment, Hardware Cryptographic IP, Secure Debug, Security Configurator) to RZ MPU.

  • RZ Multi-OS Package This package is the software package consisting of RZ/G Flexible Software Package (FSP) as software package for Renesas MCU with Arm® Cortex-M Core and OpenAMP as standardization API of framework for interprocessor communication for developing multi OS solution.

  • HTML5 Package HTML5 enables rich HMI development based on advanced Web technologies including JavaScript.

    • Chromium Package This package provides additional Chromium functions (rendering engine: Blink).

    • Gecko Package This package provides additional rendering engine Gecko.

  • Qt6 Package This package is for integrating Qt, a cross-platform GUI application development framework. (This package provides for VLP v4. VLP v3 includes Qt5.6.3 for VLP.)

  • Industrial Software Packages

    • Industrial Network Package Provides examples for using industrial Ethernet protocols and frameworks to accelerate Ethernet communication.

    • Time-sensitive Network Package Offers examples for using TSN technologies, enabling real‑time communication over Ethernet.

    • XDP Package Includes examples for using XDP, a high‑performance Linux kernel packet‑processing framework designed for efficient, low‑latency network handling.

    • OpenPLC Package Explains how to install OpenPLC and the OpenPLC Runtime on both a Windows PC and the evaluation board.

    • CODESYS Package Provides instructions for installing CODESYS and the CODESYS Runtime on a Windows PC and the evaluation board.
